# David's AI Daily Brief

> A daily distillation of The AI Daily Brief podcast, filtered through an
> NHS / general-practice lens (GP's Corner). Personal, non-commercial.

## Today

- [Latest brief (Markdown)](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/index.md): today's edition as clean Markdown — preferred for agents
- [Latest brief (HTML)](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/): today's edition, human-readable
- [Structured data (JSON)](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/brief.json): today's brief as JSON

## Archive & audio

- [Archive](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/archive): all past briefs (HTML)
- Per-edition Markdown: https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/a/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md
- [Podcast feed](https://davids-ai-brief.netlify.app/feed.xml): daily audio brief (RSS)

## Notes for agents

- For reading, prefer the Markdown (.md) mirrors: every edition is published at
  /index.md (latest) and /a/<date>.md (archive), alongside the HTML.
- Each edition has fixed sections: One Idea, The Other Side, The Truth Beneath,
  GP's Corner, NLW's Takes, All Headlines.
- GP's Corner is AI commentary, not from the podcast. Source links resolve to aidailybrief.ai.
- All editorial content © The AI Daily Brief. This is a personal, non-commercial reading page.
